bookings.name: Carbone NYC
bookings.summary: Opens 30 days ahead at 10:00 AM ET on Resy. $25/pp lunch, $50/pp dinner deposit. Dress code: no shorts, open-toed shoes, tank tops.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 30 days in advance at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. Book via Resy or by email. $25 per person for lunch, $50 per person for dinner, plus tax. Dinner: cancel by 12:00 PM day-of. Lunch: 12+ hours prior. Dress code: no shorts, open-toed shoes, or tank tops. No strollers.

bookings.name: Torrisi Bar & Restaurant
bookings.summary: Opens 30 days ahead at 10:00 AM ET on Resy. Parties up to 6. Bar counter walk-ins first come, first served.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 30 days in advance at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. Parties up to 6, exclusively on Resy. Dress code: athletic wear prohibited. No strollers or high chairs. Corkage fee applies.

bookings.name: Via Carota
bookings.summary: Opens 30 days ahead at 10:00 AM ET on Resy. Limited releases — walk-ins always welcome.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 30 days in advance at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. Limited reservations released on Resy. Walk-ins are always welcome.

bookings.name: Tatiana
bookings.summary: Opens 28 days ahead at 12:00 PM ET on Resy. Bar/patio seats may be held for walk-ins.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 28 days in advance at 12:00 PM Eastern Time. Book via Resy. Bar seats and patio tables may be held for walk-ins.

bookings.name: Semma
bookings.summary: Opens 15 days ahead at 9:00 AM ET on Resy. Limited walk-in bar seats nightly.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 15 days in advance at 9:00 AM Eastern Time. Book via Resy. Walk-in bar seats are first-come, first-served.

bookings.name: Lilia
bookings.summary: Opens 28 days ahead at 10:00 AM ET on Resy. Walk-in bar and patio seats possible; arrive early.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 28 days in advance at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. Book via Resy. Walk-in bar and patio seats are possible; arrive early.

bookings.name: Misi
bookings.summary: Opens 30 days ahead at 10:00 AM ET on Resy. Popular pasta destination — set a drop alert.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 30 days in advance at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. Book via Resy. Popular pasta destination; set an alert for drop time.

bookings.name: Don Angie
bookings.summary: Opens 7 days ahead at 9:00 AM ET on OpenTable. Tables disappear quickly after the drop.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 7 days in advance at 9:00 AM Eastern Time. Reservations are exclusively on OpenTable. Tables disappear quickly after the drop.

bookings.name: I Sodi
bookings.summary: Opens 14 days ahead at midnight ET on Resy. Walk-ins always welcome — midnight releases sell out quickly.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 14 days in advance at 12:00 AM Eastern Time. Book via Resy. Walk-ins are always welcome; midnight releases sell out quickly.

bookings.name: Double Chicken Please
bookings.summary: Opens 6 days ahead at midnight ET on Resy. $2.50/pp booking fee. 70%+ of The Coop is walk-in.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 6 days in advance at 12:00 AM Eastern Time. Book via Resy. $2.50 per person booking fee; non-refundable if modified/cancelled. Over 70% of The Coop seating is walk-in.

bookings.name: Le Café Louis Vuitton
bookings.summary: Opens 28 days ahead at midnight ET on Resy.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 28 days in advance at 12:00 AM Eastern Time. Book via Resy. Reservations drop at midnight ET.

bookings.name: Golden Diner
bookings.summary: Opens 30 days ahead at midnight ET on Resy.
bookings.rawText: Reservations open 30 days in advance at 12:00 AM Eastern Time. Book via Resy. Reservations drop at midnight ET.

urlsOnly.name: Rubirosa
urlsOnly.bookingInfo: Opens 7 days ahead at midnight ET on Resy. Leftover slots re-drop after cancellations. Midnight releases go fast.

urlsOnly.name: Raoul's
urlsOnly.bookingInfo: Opens 30 days ahead at 8:00 AM ET on Resy. Morning drop — set an alarm.

urlsOnly.name: L'Artusi
urlsOnly.bookingInfo: Opens 14 days ahead at 9:00 AM ET on Resy. Two-week rolling window — daily drops at 9 AM.

urlsOnly.name: The Polo Bar
urlsOnly.notes: Phone-only reservations released monthly — no online link.

urlsOnly.name: Theodora (Fort Greene, Brooklyn)
urlsOnly.notes: NYC_DATA #1450 is a different Theodora (Upper East Side). This is the Fort Greene one from TableDrop.

notes.tatianaDupe: NYC_DATA has TWO Tatiana cards at the same 10 Lincoln Center Plaza address: #1012 'Tatiana by Kwame Onwuachi' (Lincoln Center) and #1893 'Tatiana' (Upper West Side). These are duplicates — merge/fold in a separate pass. Using #1012 for TableDrop data because the neighborhood matches.
notes.theodoraMismatch: TableDrop's Theodora is at Fort Greene, Brooklyn (Mediterranean). NYC_DATA #1450 Theodora is at 141 E 62nd St, Upper East Side. Likely different restaurants with the same name — TableDrop's is missing from our guide and needs a new card.
notes.poloBar: Phone-only reservations; no online link. Still has card #1241 in NYC_DATA — will get bookingInfo note but no reserveUrl.
